calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order To Compel Mediation And Award Costs And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Petition For An Order To Compel Mediation And Award Costs And Attorneys Fees

is DENIED. No authority is cited for the proposition that requested relief is available.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order To Compel Mediation And Award Costs And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-22-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER JOSHUA BERLINER, AURORA KURLAND Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order To Compel Mediation And Award Costs And Attorneys Fees

is continued to February 25, 2026. No later than February 11, 2026 Petitioner to file a supplemental brief not to exceed 2 pages, providing citations (no argument) to cases granting petitions to compel mediation under CC&Rs or any other contracts involving a mediation clause. If no such cases are located, the brief shall state "none."

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order To Compel Mediation And Award Costs And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Jan-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER JOSHUA BERLINER, AURORA KURLAND Notice Of Hearing On Petition For An Order To Compel Mediation And Award Costs And Attorneys Fees is continued to January 22, 2026 on the Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
